properties.displayName: KEV Framework - Incident Closed by Logic App MI Outside Auto-Close Window
properties.description: The KEV-Remediate Logic App's managed identity has Microsoft Sentinel Responder on the workspace, which means it can comment on, modify, and close ANY incident - not just KEV ones. This rule alerts when an incident NOT generated by the CISA KEV analytics rule is closed by the MI. Tunes out legitimate AutoClose-KEVIncidents activity by checking the source rule.
properties.query:
let KEVRuleId = 'c3f4a812-9e2b-4d71-b85a-6e7c1d3f20a9';
let MIName = '{{kevRemediateLogicAppName}}';
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where Status == 'Closed'
| where ModifiedBy contains MIName
| where AlertIds != ''
| mv-expand parse_json(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds)
| extend RuleIdLower = tolower(tostring(RelatedAnalyticRuleIds))
| summarize
    AnyKEVRule = maxif(true, RuleIdLower contains KEVRuleId),
    AllRuleIds = make_set(RuleIdLower),
    arg_max(TimeGenerated, *)
    by IncidentNumber
| where AnyKEVRule == false  // it was closed by MI but NOT a KEV-rule incident -> investigate
| project TimeGenerated, IncidentNumber, IncidentName = Title, ClosedBy = ModifiedBy, ClassificationReason, AllRuleIds
